title: Jönköping Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Jönköping with a Z-Score of -3.37. This event has a critical score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Jönköping are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with high heating degree days (HDD) of 12.8 GG and no cooling degree days (CDD). 
 The relative humidity is at 59% and the wind speed is moderate at 4.0 km/h, adding to the overall discomfort.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to ensure public safety and minimize damage.
